author: quietsmile
name: Order-12 N-gram Backoff + 256K Chunks + Alpha 0.70
blurb: Extended n-gram backoff to order 12 (from 9) with 256K token chunks (from 1M) and higher alpha_max=0.70 (from 0.60). 11L 512d GQA 8/4, MLP 3.0x, XSA-4, LeakyReLU(0.9)², BigramHash(4096), GPTQ int5. Mean of 2 seeds: val_bpb 0.2834 (std 0.0001). Key changes: (1) 6 additional hash primes for orders 10-15, (2) 256K chunk tokens for faster cache refresh, (3) alpha_max 0.70 for stronger n-gram mixing. Training 525s on 8xH100 SXM equivalent (L20Z), eval 431s.
